mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_WH_ZONE_M AS target USING (SELECT #{zoneId} AS ZONE_ID) AS source ON (target.ZONE_ID = source.ZONE_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ZONE_NM = #{zoneNm}, ZONE_TYPE = #{zoneType}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, VIEW_SEQ = #{viewSeq}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{updtUser} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CMPY_CD, WH_CD, ZONE_CD, ZONE_NM, ZONE_TYPE, USE_YN, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, DELETED_YN, VIEW_SEQ) VALUES (#{cmpyCd}, #{whCd}, #{zoneCd}, #{zoneNm}, #{zoneType}, 'Y', GETDATE(), #{saveUser}, 'N', #{viewSeq});
